narrative.summary: You're on Geary Ave in a two-story corner build-out where every detail—the paint color, the glassware, the way the light hits at breakfast—feels deliberated over, without tipping precious. The breakfast sandwich comes crowned with a crisp hashbrown and Red Leicester queso, and the brûléed porridge has a crackly sugar crust that'll make you forget cereal exists. At dinner, Jake Skakun's wine list balances esoteric glou-glou with serious bottles, and the ribeye actually delivers.

blocks.title: The Space
blocks.body: You're on Geary Ave in a two-story corner build-out where every detail—the paint color, the glassware, the way the light hits at breakfast—feels deliberated over. The design runs clean and considered without tipping precious: good wood, real materials, a dining room that works as well at 10am as it does when the wine list comes out at dinner. Upstairs and down, it's the kind of room that makes you want to linger.

blocks.title: The Food
blocks.body: The menu moves easily between a breakfast sandwich crowned with a crisp hashbrown and Red Leicester queso, brûléed porridge with a crackly sugar crust, and masala eggs that people come back for. At dinner, expect caviar service and a proper ribeye alongside Jake Skakun's exceptional wine list—a balance of natural glou-glou and serious bottles that earned a Star Wine List feature. It's gastropub cooking that knows when to show off and when to just nail the fundamentals.

blocks.title: Go When
blocks.body: Breakfast or brunch when you want something more interesting than the usual cafe circuit, or for a date night where you can work through the wine list without the dining room taking itself too seriously. The staff handles dietary restrictions without fuss, so it works for those anniversary dinners where someone's avoiding gluten.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Love this place! Don't miss out on their breakfast menu, especially their breakfast sandwich (which is topped with a hashbrown and silky delicious Red Leicester queso) and my favourite, their bruleed porridge. The porridge is totally unique to anything I've ever ordered in a restaurant and it's phenomenal! It's a must get. I've also had the masala eggs and can vouch they're also very good.

The restaurant is beautifully designed and decorated from top to bottom, down to every last detail. The service was also great! Can't wait to come back again soon."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Went here for Valentine’s Day. What wonderful staff and meal. They really took care of us the entire night given dietary restrictions.The drinks were novel and tasty. Had the bubbles and bump caviar for a tiny luxury. Ribeye steak melted in your mouth and we shared it. Will definitely come again for special event. Absolute class…"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "We visited General Public for happy hour and were immediately struck by the beautiful interior. The burger was stacked with a hearty patty, melted Red Leicester and cheddar, caramelized onions, and a punch of tangy Branston pickle. The fries were perfectly crisp on the outside, tender inside.
We found the service attentive and friendly. Altogether, an enjoyable visit"
